title: SU men's lax flips Class of '26 recruit from UNC
summary: Syracuse University men's lacrosse team recruits a Class of 2026 prospect from UNC. This article concerns college athletics recruitment and has no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations, innovation initiatives, or civic infrastructure.
